# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS', description: 'Build commands', defaultValue: 'mvn clean install')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPTS', description: 'Test scripts', defaultValue: 'mvn test')
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_STEPS', description: 'Deployment steps', defaultValue: 'echo "Deploying artifact"')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.BUILD_COMMANDS}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.TEST_SCRIPTS}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.DEPLOYMENT_STEPS}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
